description:
Your company's security team has requested a quarterly audit of the Jenkins CI/CD server. Use the Jenkins Script Console to execute a Groovy script that collects system information and writes an audit report to /var/jenkins_home/audit_report.txt. 

The report must include the following information:
1. Jenkins Version
2. JVM Information
3. Installed Plugins (a complete listing with short name and version, e.g., git:5.2.1)
4. Configured Jobs (a listing of all job names)

The script should write the report to /var/jenkins_home/audit_report.txt and print the output to the Script Console for visual confirmation.

Login credentials:
  Username: admin
  Password: Admin123!

Note: There are several pre-existing jobs already configured in this Jenkins instance that should appear in your audit report.
